[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 010110111 6
1 001111100 5
2 111111011 8
3 001011001 4
4 101111110 7
5 111111111 a
6 111111011 8
7 101111110 7

01 10 111111111 a match 5
12 21 111111011 8 match 2 6
23 32 101111011 7
34 43 100111111 7
45 54 110111111 8
56 65 111111110 8
67 76 111111111 a match 5
70 07 011111111 8

02 20 001111101 6
13 31 111111011 8 match 2 6
24 42 001011111 6
35 53 110111010 6
46 64 101111111 8
57 75 110111111 8
60 06 101111100 6
71 17 111111111 a match 5

03 30 101111110 7 match 4 7
14 41 111111111 a match 5
25 52 111111011 8 match 2 6
36 63 101111110 7 match 4 7
47 74 010110111 6 match 0
50 05 111111110 8
61 16 111111111 a match 5
72 27 011111111 8

04 40 001111111 7
15 51 111111011 8 match 2 6
26 62 101111101 7
37 73 110111111 8
